rulings.Case Title: THOMAS GOURLEY VS. ELISSA FILIPPINI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 26, 2016, Line 5. CROSS DEFENDANTS THOMAS GOURLEY, THOMAS GOURLEY'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. Cross-Complaint sufficiently alleges each cause of action. Cross-Complaint is not uncertain. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of the declaration per CCP 430.41(a)(3) to department 501 no later than 4:30 p.m. on May 25, 2016. Moving party to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future and provide courtesy copy of the pleading being challenged. Failure to comply will result in motion being taken off calendar. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KENYATTA LAVOIE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Motion For Set Adise/Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 26, 2016, Line 7. DEFENDANT'S Amended Motion For Set Aside/Vacate Judgment. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden for discretionary relief under CCP 473(b). Moving party is not entitled to mandatory relief as attorney mistake (failure to properly calendar motion to vacate) did not cause a default. Additionally, insufficient notice was waived by opposing side in open Court and the motion is ruled upon on the merits. =(501/REQ)
